title: odonia trinervia
intro: Odonia trinervia, also known as the three-veined odon, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Odonia trinervia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Odonia trinervia include tea and infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
